sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27491" key="dissofuh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δισσο-φῠής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n27491.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of double nature,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:14:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.97</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
